commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

commit.message:
Simplify deployment: single production environment

Changes:
- Simplified workflow to single production environment
- Removed test/prod branching logic
- Created local deployment script (scripts/deploy.sh)
- Added quick start guide for end-to-end deployment

Deployment options:
1. From laptop: ./scripts/deploy.sh (interactive, easiest to debug)
2. From GitHub: Auto-deploy on push to main

The local script:
- Walks through project linking
- Previews migrations before applying
- Optionally sets Edge Function secrets
- Can load secrets from .env.production

GitHub secrets needed (same as before):
- SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN
- SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF (not _PROD, just _REF)
- SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
- TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM

commit.message:
[PLT-633] Show descriptive message when transcript events are cleared due to size (#3395)

* [PLT-633] Show descriptive message when transcript events are cleared due to size

When a sample's JSON exceeds browser processing limits (>512MB total or
>350MB events), the preprocessor clears the events array to prevent browser
crashes. Previously this showed "No events to display" with no explanation.

Now the preprocessor injects an `_events_cleared` marker into the JSON,
and the Transcript tab shows a descriptive message explaining that events
were removed due to size and directing users to the Messages tab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make events-cleared detection typesafe

Remove _events_cleared marker injection from the byte-level
preprocessor. Instead, detect cleared events typesafely in
SampleState by checking if a loaded sample has messages but
no events. The flag is stored in app state and flows through
the store/hooks to TranscriptPanel without any unsafe casts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update changelog

* Update schema

commit.message:
Implement classical mixtapes pipeline

- Added Python scripts for complete FLAC mixtape workflow:
  * download.py: YouTube search + FLAC conversion via yt-dlp
  * tag.py: Mutagen-based classical metadata tagging (composer, conductor, movements)
  * gaps.py: FFmpeg silent gap generation
  * artwork.py: Image embedding into FLAC Picture blocks
  * build.py: Pipeline orchestrator

- Created example Shostakovich Symphony No. 7 (Noseda) YAML with 4 movements
- M3U playlist generation for media players
- Syncthing integration for automatic phone syncing (Tailscale + LAN)
- Complete documentation in README with setup instructions

First mixtape tested and working: 667 MB of tagged FLACs, ready for listening.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add server integration for portal mode vs normal mode (eo-bw3)

Server routing now transitions based on WiFi state machine state:
- Portal mode: serves captive portal form at /, redirects unknown
  GETs to portal, provides /scan, /status, /provision endpoints
- Normal mode: serves landing page and stored pages as before
- Both modes serve OMI API routes by default (FR-009)

Key changes:
- server.rs: Add PortalState shared state, ServerMode enum, and
  mode-aware route handlers. Portal routes (POST /provision,
  GET /scan, GET /status) registered alongside OMI routes.
  API denial guard with deny_api_during_provisioning feature (FR-010).
  OMI paths excluded from captive portal redirect (FR-011).
- main.rs: Create PortalState, pass to server. DNS server lifecycle
  tied to AP mode. Provision polling in main loop processes form
  submissions and attempts WiFi connection with status feedback
  via shared ConnectionStatus (FR-016). Mode transitions on
  WiFi state changes.
- Cargo.toml: Add deny_api_during_provisioning feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Mission Control Docker build: ensure public dir exists in builder

The COPY --from=builder /app/public step fails in CI because BuildKit's
content-addressable storage can't resolve an empty directory with only
a .gitkeep. Adding mkdir -p public before npm run build guarantees the
directory exists in the builder layer.

commit.message:
Add service worker and PWA manifest for offline use

Pre-caches all assets on first visit so the app works fully offline.
Can be installed as a standalone app from Chrome's address bar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GLG field mapping and idle-state detection in remote control

GLG response order is: freq, mod, att, ctcss, sys_name, grp_name,
ch_name, sql, mute, sys_tag, chan_tag, p25nac. Previous mapping had
ch_name at position 9 (SYS_TAG="NONE") causing display to always show
"NONE", and sys_name/grp_name mapped to SQL/MUT fields.

Also return None when sql != "1" (squelch closed = not receiving),
which fixes the log creating an infinite-duration entry while idle.

commit.message:
Security audit fixes: .env, XSS, RLS, indexes, iOS, PWA icons

Critical:
- Remove .env from git tracking; add to .gitignore
- Add DOMPurify to BlogPost.tsx — sanitize HTML before dangerouslySetInnerHTML

High (Security):
- Fix rate_limits RLS: restrict to service_role only (was anon/authenticated)
- Add 8 missing FK indexes: blocked_ips, blog_posts, photo_verifications,
  reports (reporter/reported/reviewed), pending_matches.user2_id

Medium:
- Migrate update-ghosting-stats from console.* to shared structured logger
- PWA manifest: convert icons from JPEG to PNG (spec requirement)
  — convert app-icon.jpg + favicon.jpg → .png via sips
  — update vite.config.ts includeAssets + manifest icon src/type

iOS:
- Fix legacy CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY "iPhone Developer" → "Apple Development"
  (was causing signing warnings on Xcode 13+)

Manual action still needed:
- Enable "Prevent use of leaked passwords" in Supabase Dashboard
  → Authentication → Settings → Password

commit.message:
fix(tests): patch app.api.deps.AsyncSessionLocal to avoid breaking get_db

Patching app.db.session.AsyncSessionLocal caused get_db (in the same
module) to receive a MagicMock session, making all endpoint DB calls
fail with "object MagicMock can't be used in 'await' expression".

Fix: promote the AsyncSessionLocal import to module level in deps.py so
the fixture can patch app.api.deps.AsyncSessionLocal — only affecting
_resolve_pat, leaving app.db.session.AsyncSessionLocal (and get_db)
untouched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Refactor, fix reload bug & modularize VoteService

- Fix config reload overwriting user goals with jar defaults (use mergeYamlDefaults for config.yml)
- Fix retroactive goal trigger on reload: sealGoalsForCurrentDay() pre-claims already-reached goals without rewarding
- Move all SQL to VoteRepository, monthly draw logic to MonthlyDrawService
- Extract result records (MonthlyDrawResult, DrawHistoryResult, TopMonthEntry) and internal records (DateContext, GlobalState, DrawCandidate) to own files
- VoteService reduced from ~1100 to ~330 lines
- Fix VotifierPlus version 6.12.0 → 1.4.3 (actual latest in BenCodez repo)
- Async SQL + PAPI stats cache (5s TTL), shared SQLite connection, offline vote delivery

and rebuild the table name map. Fixes items__owners (and other

syncToPostgres hadn't processed all Store_SetSchema events within
the initial 5-second discovery window.

animations; shell content renders without wrapper.

commit.message:
feat: rebuild Finger Piano with finger-count note system

Replace unreliable key-targeting mechanic with:
- Count raised fingers (0-5) per hand → maps to C, E, G, B, C5
- Note sustains while finger count held, fades on change (monophonic per hand)
- 180ms debounce prevents accidental triggers mid-transition
- Both hands play simultaneously (max 2-note harmony)
- Visual: skeleton + floating note name + count bubble above palm
- Bottom strip shows 5 note keys, lights up when active
- Score = total note triggers in 60 seconds
